metadata.disclaimer: Comprehensive Bangladesh intercity routes covering all 8 divisions and major cities. Data from official sources and Shohoz.com.
sources: Shyamoli, Green Line, Hanif, Ena, Shohagh operators

routes.notes: Most buses go to Dhaka (Sayedabad). Ask for buses heading towards Mymensingh to drop off at Gazipur Chowrasta.
Board buses at Gazipur Chowrasta that are heading towards Chittagong/Bandarban from northern districts.
Take Sylhet-Dhaka bus, then Dhaka-Rajshahi bus from Gabtoli.
Travel to Dhaka (Sayedabad) first, then take Khulna bus via Padma Bridge.
